flashcards.definition: The regular payment (monthly/annually) you make to maintain insurance coverage.
The amount you pay out-of-pocket before insurance begins covering costs.
A fixed amount you pay for a covered service (e.g., $30 doctor visit, $10 prescription).
Pure death benefit for a specific term (10-30 years); no cash value; most affordable protection.
Replaces 60-70% of income if you're unable to work due to illness or injury — often the most overlooked coverage.
